assertions.assertion: Implements IClaimsTransformation with a TransformAsync method
Creates a new ClaimsIdentity and adds it to the principal via principal.AddIdentity() — does NOT mutate the existing identity in-place
assertions.rationale: Mutates the existing identity in-place via ((ClaimsIdentity)principal.Identity).AddClaim() — does NOT create a new identity or use AddIdentity()

assertions.assertion: Loads roles from a local repository or database based on the user's subject claim
assertions.rationale: Gets userId from sub claim, then calls _roleRepo.GetRolesAsync(userId)

assertions.assertion: Registers the implementation with DI (e.g. AddTransient<IClaimsTransformation, ...>)
Warns against using IClaimsTransformation on the IdentityServer host for modifying token claims
assertions.rationale: No mention of this warning at all
